summary: Comprehensive testing of Odoo ODS validation screens completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend has data loading issues requiring manual refresh, but core functionality works.

ui_bugs.issue: Data does not auto-load on page navigation - requires manual refresh button click
Data does not auto-load on page navigation - requires manual refresh button click
Data does not auto-load on page navigation - requires manual refresh button click

integration_issues.issue: useEffect hooks not triggering API calls automatically on page mount - lazy loading behavior

passed_tests: GET /api/stock-locations returns 52 locations ordered by write_date desc
GET /api/pos-lines-full returns 956 total lines with pagination (50/page, 20 pages)
GET /api/health returns complete monitoring data (6 tables, 2 companies, 0 orphan lines, 6 errors)
Frontend navigation between all 5 pages (Panel, Historial, Locations, POS Lines, Health)
Locations search functionality works after manual refresh
POS Lines filtering system works (9 filter inputs: company, dates, cancelled, marca/tipo/tela/talla/color)
POS Lines pagination controls present and functional
Health page displays all required components (table cards, POS by company, integrity check, recent errors)
Manual refresh buttons work correctly on all pages

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (core functionality works, data loading requires manual refresh)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend data loading issue: useEffect hooks in LocationsPage, PosLinesPage, and HealthPage are not automatically triggering API calls on component mount. Data loads correctly when refresh buttons are clicked manually, indicating the API integration works but initial loading is broken.
